Bhagat SINGH aur Batukeshwar DUTT ne 1929 mein DELHI mein British GOVERNMENT ke khilaf bomb blast kiya.
Mysore ki RANI Lakshmi Ammani ne ANGREZON ke khilaf ladai ladi aur apne rajya ki raksha ki.
INDIA mein 1943 mein Bengal mein ek bada AKALTA (famine) pada, jismein 20-30 lakh log mare.
Maharana PRATAP ne 1576 mein HALDIGHATI ki ladai mein AKBAR ke senapati MAHABAT KHAN ko haraya.
INDIA ki pehli mahila pradhanmantri INDIRA GANDHI ne 1971 mein BANGLADESH mukti sangram mein mahatvapurn bhumika nibhai.
Razia SULTAN ne 1236 mein DELHI ke TAKHT par kabza kiya aur 4 saal tak shasan kiya.
1857 ki KRANTI ke dauraan, TATYA TOPE ne ANGREZON ke khilaf guerilla yudh kiya.
BIRSA MUNDA ne 1899-1900 mein ANGREZON ke khilaf ek bada VIRODH kiya, jismein 400 se zyada log shaheed hue.
CHENNAI ke MADRAS PRESIDENCY COLLEGE mein 1840 mein ek mahila shikshak, SAVITRI BAI PHULE, ne ladkon ke saath ladkiyon ko bhi padhaya.
1974 mein, INDIRA GANDHI ke netritva mein, BHARAT ne POKHARAN mein pehla parmanu parikshan kiya, jise 'Smiling Buddha' kaha gaya.
CHACHA NEHRU ne 1952 mein BHARAT mein doordarshan ki shuruaat ki.
RANI RUDRAMA DEVI ne 13vi shatabdi mein WARANGAL rajya par shasan kiya.
BHARAT mein pehli bar 1833 mein CALCUTTA mein ek railway line ki shuruaat hui.
SAROJINI NAIDU ne 1925 mein MADRAS ke governor banne ka padva prapt kiya.
TANTYA BHIL ne 1874 mein ANGREZON ke khilaf ek veer virodh kiya.
BHARAT ke LIETENANT UMAR FAROOQ BHARATIYA fouj ke sabse pehle para commando the, jo 1971 mein BANGLADESH mukti sangram mein shaheed hue.
RAJA RAMMOHAN ROY ne 1814 mein BHARAT mein pehla school of western education shuru kiya, jismein ladkiyon ko bhi padhaya gaya.
BHARATIYA CRICKETER KAPIL DEV ne 1983 mein WORLD CUP jeeta, jismein unhone 175 over mein 17 chauka aur 16 chhakke lagaaye.
BHARATIYA scientist VIKRAM SARABHAI ne 1975 mein BHARAT ka pehla satellite launch kiya, jiska naam ARYABHATT tha.
BHARATIYA freedom fighter BHAGAT SINGH ke khaas dost BHAI PARMANAND ne bhi ANGREZON ke khilaf ladai ladi aur 8 saal jail mein rahe.
SHIVAJI MAHARAJ ne 1674 mein MARATHA saamrajya ki sthaapna ki.
RAJA RAVI VERMA ne 1894 mein BHARAT ke pehle art studio ki sthaapna ki.
DR. B.R. AMBEDKAR ne 1930 mein DALIT rights ke liye mahatvapurn andolan kiya.
KAMAL PURI ne 1950s mein BHARAT ki pehli passenger airline ki sthaapna ki.
MADAM BHIKHAIJI RUSTOM CAMA ne 1889 mein BHARAT ki pehli mahila trade union ki sthaapna ki.
BHARAT ke pehle PM Jawaharlal NEHRU ne 1952 mein ASIA ke sabse bade DAM, BHAKRA NANGAL DAM ka udghatan kiya.
KOLKATA ki ST. PAUL'S CATHEDRAL 1847 mein banayi gayi thi, jo ki BHARAT mein sabse purani CATHEDRAL hai.
SARDAR VALLABHBHAI PATEL ne 1947 mein BHARAT ke 562 RAJYON ko ekjut kiya, jise 'IRON MAN OF INDIA' kaha jata hai.
BHARAT ke pahle SPACE SCIENTIST, DR. HOMI JEHANGIR BHABHA ne 1945 mein TATA INSTITUTE OF FUNDAMENTAL RESEARCH ki sthaapna ki.
MADHYA PRADESH ke BHEDAGHAT mein 1818 mein ANGREZON aur MARATHA SENA ke beech ek bada YUDH hua tha.
Pandit NEHRU ne 1947 mein BHARAT ke pehle Rashtrapati ke roop mein Dr. RAJENDRA PRASAD ko nivedit kiya.
SULTAN MUHAMMAD BIN TUGHLAQ ne 1327 mein DELHI se Daulatabad shahar ko apna naya rajdhani banane ki koshish ki.
Begum ROKEYA SAKHAWAT HOSSAIN ne 1911 mein BHARAT mein mahila shiksha ke liye ek school ki sthapna ki.
KUMAR GANDHARVA ne 1940s mein MADHYA PRADESH ke folk sangeet ko punarjeevit kiya.
KAMALADEVI CHATTOPADHYAY ne 1930s mein BHARAT mein hastshilp aur lokkala ko badhava dena shuru kiya.
